mentions.note: Landed big hyperscaler account, rebranding from cell phone play to data center supplier; shifting narrative as positive.

Led data center rally surge despite not being pure data center play; core business is cell phones (structural decline per Arm Holdings); rode momentum wave in rally; part of correction/pullback now underway.
Cristiano Amon participating in Computex; stable positioning amid semiconductor cycle.
Caller asked buy at these levels; Cramer says no; making series of missteps; ARM superior alternative.
